title: Chorus
pitch: Spare weakened foes by matching their hum's pitch, and they join the choir whose harmony is your firepower.
howto: Weaken creatures until they stop and listen, then tap them and hold the slider on their hum to recruit instead of kill. Distinct voice types form chords - triads and sevenths multiply your power, clashing seconds weaken it. Recruits, shards, upgrades and songs persist forever.
controls: Drag to move. Tap a glowing listener, then drag the pitch slider into the band and hold. Silence button kills for bonus shards.
